products.title: Ergonomic Mesh Office Chair with Lumbar Support
products.description: Adjustable lumbar support, breathable mesh back, 360° swivel, armrests, and seat height adjustment. Supports up to 300 lbs.

products.title: Apple MacBook Pro 14-inch Laptop, M3 Pro Chip, 18GB RAM, 512GB SSD
products.description: M3 Pro chip with 11-core CPU and 14-core GPU. Up to 18 hours of battery life. Stunning Liquid Retina XDR display.

products.title: Solid Wood Writing Desk with Drawer, 55 Inch Home Office Desk
products.description: Rustic solid wood surface, built-in storage drawer, sturdy metal legs, easy assembly. 55" W x 24" D x 30" H.

products.title: LEGO Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set – Artificial Flowers with Roses (939 Pieces)
products.description: Build a beautiful bouquet of wildflowers with 939 LEGO pieces. Includes poppies, lavender, and roses. Great for display or gifting.

products.title: OREO Double Stuf Chocolate Sandwich Cookies, Family Size, 18.71 oz
products.description: Double Stuf OREO cookies with twice the creamy filling. Perfect for snacking, desserts, or sharing. Resealable family-size pack.
